mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sale_items (id, order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity, subtotal) VALUES
( #{item.id, typeHandler=org.shining319.newsstand_backend_system.config.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{item.orderId, typeHandler=org.shining319.newsstand_backend_system.config.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{item.productId, typeHandler=org.shining319.newsstand_backend_system.config.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{item.productName}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal} )
